name: ARCHIVED Congresswoman Abby Finkenauer

name: ARCHIVED Congresswoman Abby Finkenauer
tweet: The package passed today provides, to an extent, urgently needed help for families, small businesses and so many Iowans struggling under the hardships caused by this pandemic. However, stimulus checks should be higher, and more support given directly to Iowans who need it most.

name: ARCHIVED Congresswoman Abby Finkenauer
tweet: While I’m happy to have helped pass a deal to help folks just before the holidays, this package will not come close to undoing the pain this year has brought — especially to those who have lost loved ones.

name: ARCHIVED Congresswoman Abby Finkenauer
